title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Capone Bege, Jinbe, Big Mom, Big Mom Pirates, Luffy, Nami as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's a gaggle of straw hats!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can let 'er rip at any time,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll go in 3 seconds later, okay? Game faces, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rest have just had their appearances changed by Bruce's Mirrors!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're animals from the forest! Don't pay any attention- tion to them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My hands and feet are stuck

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I can't get them out! What power is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Dogtooth! Are you trying to save me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're a lowly child of mine! Don't presume to overstep...

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: This guy was after Mother Caramel's picture!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How does he know that it's so crucial?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That should be a fact privy only to members of our family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: SPIT IT OUT! Who told you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We've just gotta break that damn picture...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
